---
title: "Society of St. Margaret, East Grinstead, The"
---

## Society of St. Margaret, East Grinstead, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This was an Anglican sisterhood founded by the Rev. Dr.[[person:1078] J. M. Neale] in 1855. It still exists.
This sisterhood arose out of the need for nursing in the cottages of a scattered parish and home nursing was the first work of the sisters. The rules were based on those of the Clewer sisterhood.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
